title: Unmasked
writer: Manuel Seff, Paul Yawitz, Albert DeMond
actors: Robert Rockwell, Barbra Fuller, Raymond Burr
plot: Roger Lewis, publisher of a vicious scandal sheet, is in the habit of tricking wealthy, gullible women into investing in his ventures. His latest conquest is a shapely ex-showgirl, Doris King, the wife of Harry Jackson, once a top...
